activities_projects.title: Discussion on Feathered Friends
activities_projects.objective: Encourage students to think about birds as companions and understand their role in human life
steps: Work in pairs and read the questions given before the story
Discuss who a feathered friend could be
Share your favourite bird and explain why you like it
Discuss whether birds can accompany astronauts to space
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop speaking skills and learn to express opinions
activities_projects.evaluation: Participation and clarity of ideas during discussion (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary Completion Activity
activities_projects.objective: Improve vocabulary by identifying words from meanings
steps: Read the meanings provided in the exercise
Insert the correct vowels to complete each word
Write the correct words in the notebook
Discuss answers with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn new vocabulary such as regulation, forbid, fuse, abruptly, confess, and dietitian
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct completion of vocabulary words (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Story Understanding Discussion
activities_projects.objective: Understand the plot and message of the story
steps: Read the story carefully
Discuss why Sven brought the canary to the space station
Explain how Claribel adapted to zero gravity
Share ideas on how Claribel helped the crew
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the relationship between science and observation
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of responses in discussion (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Character Analysis of Sven
activities_projects.objective: Understand the character and role of Sven in the story
steps: Identify Sven’s qualities from the story
Write examples showing his curiosity and care for Claribel
Explain how his decision helped the crew
Share your ideas with the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn how characters contribute to solving problems in stories
activities_projects.evaluation: Use of examples and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Role Play – Claribel Saves the Crew
steps: Form groups of 4–5 students
Assign roles such as narrator, Sven, Jim, and crew members
Act out the scene where Claribel collapses and the crew discovers the air problem
Perform in front of the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve communication skills and understand the story deeply

activities_projects.title: True or False Activity
steps: Read the statements provided in the exercise
Identify whether each statement is true or false
Write the correct answers with explanations
Discuss answers in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve reading comprehension and analytical skills

activities_projects.title: Adjective Matching Exercise
activities_projects.objective: Learn the use of descriptive adjectives
steps: Read the list of adjectives given in the box
Match them correctly with the nouns provided
Write the correct adjective–noun pairs
Identify the sentences where these adjectives appear in the text
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve vocabulary and understanding of descriptive language

activities_projects.title: Merged Words Formation
activities_projects.objective: Understand how merged or blended words are formed
steps: Look at the two columns of words
Combine the appropriate words
Write the merged word and its meaning
Use the merged word in a sentence
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn word formation such as brunch, motel, smog, sitcom, vlog, spork, and webinar
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct word formation and meaning (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Future Tense Practice
activities_projects.objective: Understand different ways to express future time
steps: Read examples of future tense forms in the textbook
Fill in the blanks using the correct tense form
Write your own sentences describing future plans
Share sentences with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn future tense forms like will, present progressive, and going to

activities_projects.title: Creative Writing – Importance of the Internet
steps: Look at the social media web diagram in the textbook
Identify different uses of the internet
Write an article titled 'The Importance of Internet'
Include introduction, uses, and conclusion
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve essay writing and organisation of ideas
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity, grammar, and structure of article (10 marks)
